chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-737 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 30.05.2023 Petitioners are present in person. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl. AG Sindh and Nazar Muhammad Memon, Addl.P.G Sindh along with SIP Ashok Kumar SHO PS Nabisar Road, IO/ASI Muzafar Ahmed Jat PS Nabisar Road and Inspector Muhammad Amin PS Mehran Mirpurkhas. ----- Petitioner No.1 has stated that she has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 out of her own freewill and choice but against wishes of her parents hence being annoyed her brother has got subject FIR lodged which is based on wrong facts. IO present has recorded statement of petitioner No.1 in which she has reiterated the same facts. In the light of her statement, the I.O present submits that he would dispose of this case and would submit such report before the learned Magistrate concerned. After such report is submitted, learned Magistrate concerned shall pass an appropriate order on said report in the light of recommendation of the I.O. disposing of the case, in accordance with law. Petitioners are satisfied and seek disposal of the petition in the above terms. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the terms as stated above. Police officials present are directed to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
